title: Rocket Lab Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Rocket Lab (RKLB) has attracted significant analyst attention with a consensus buy rating among Wall Street analysts. The average price target sits at approximately $100, with individual analysts ranging from $60 to $150. Recent analyst upgrades have come from major firms including Deutsche Bank (raising target to $120 from $73) and Needham (raising target to $120 from $95). The positive analyst sentiment reflects confidence in Rocket Lab's revenue growth trajectory, defense contract wins, and upcoming Neutron rocket first flight. Key factors driving positive recommendations include the company's dominant position in small-lift launch services, growing defense revenue streams, and significant growth potential from Neutron commercialization.
